'''Sriluur''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Sriluur system/Legends|Sriluur system]]. It was orbited by six [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].

{{Star-stub}}
